items.title: The effectiveness of cardiovascular rehabilitation for transient ischaemic attack and mild stroke: A randomised controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial of 140 TIA and mild stroke participants found that a 6-week cardiovascular rehabilitation program significantly improved functional exercise capacity, physical activity, anthropometrics, blood pressure, and quality-of-life over 6 months compared with usual care.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验表明，综合心血管康复项目对于短暂性脑缺血发作（TIA）或轻度卒中患者，在功能运动能力、体力活动等方面优于常规护理。这意味着你可以更自信地推荐这些患者参与结构化的心血管康复。
items.titleZh: 心血管康复对短暂性脑缺血发作和轻度卒中患者的有效性：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项针对140名短暂性脑缺血发作（TIA）和轻度卒中患者的随机对照试验显示，为期6周的心血管康复项目在6个月内显著改善了功能性运动能力、体力活动、人体测量学指标、血压、生活质量、焦虑和抑郁，优于常规护理。
items.curatedReasonEn: This randomized controlled trial demonstrates that an integrated cardiovascular rehabilitation program is superior to usual care for patients with transient ischemic attack (TIA) or mild stroke in terms of functional exercise capacity and physical activity. This means you can more confidently recommend structured cardiovascular rehabilitation for these patients.
items.limitation: 研究的干预期为6周，评估期为6个月，长期效果仍需进一步研究确认。
items.limitationEn: The intervention period of the study was 6 weeks, and the assessment period was 6 months; long-term effects still require further research for confirmation.

items.title: Prevalence of eating disorders and disordered eating in athletes: a systematic review and meta-analysis
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis estimated the prevalence of eating disorders and disordered eating among athletes across training levels and assessment methods, identifying moderators associated with prevalence estimates by searching PubMed/MEDLINE, Scopus, Web of Science, and SportDiscus up to December 2024.
items.curatedReason: 运动员中饮食失调的患病率估计高达 18.8%（使用综合方法），这足以让你在日常评估中增加对饮食行为的筛查。对于那些存在风险的运动员，你需要考虑转介至专科或采用更积极的干预策略。
items.titleZh: 运动员饮食失调和紊乱性饮食的患病率：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析评估了运动员在不同训练水平和评估方法下饮食失调和紊乱性饮食的患病率，并识别了与患病率估计相关的调节因素。研究数据库检索至2024年12月。
items.curatedReasonEn: The estimated prevalence of disordered eating among athletes is as high as 18.8% (using combined methods), which is significant enough to warrant increased screening of eating behaviors in your daily assessments. For at-risk athletes, consider referral to specialists or implementing more proactive intervention strategies.
items.limitation: 尽管是系统综述，但纳入研究的异质性（训练水平、评估方法）可能影响结果的总体解释。
items.limitationEn: Despite being a systematic review, heterogeneity among included studies (training levels, assessment methods) may affect the overall interpretation of results.

items.title: Subtype-specific optimal cut-off values of the Berg Balance Scale for predicting independent walking in inpatient stroke rehabilitation: a multicentre cohort study.
items.summary: A multicenter retrospective cohort study of 565 stroke patients (316 ischemic, 249 hemorrhagic) in Korea determined subtype-specific optimal cut-off values of the Berg Balance Scale for predicting independent walking at discharge after inpatient rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 这项多中心队列研究为卒中患者出院时独立行走能力提供了亚型特异性Berg平衡量表截断值。这将是你临床实践中，评估卒中患者预后和制定个性化康复计划的有力工具。
items.titleZh: 住院卒中康复中Berg平衡量表预测独立行走能力的亚型特异性最佳截断值：一项多中心队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对韩国565名卒中患者（316名缺血性，249名出血性）的多中心回顾性队列研究确定了入院时Berg平衡量表预测出院时独立行走能力的亚型特异性最佳截断值。研究发现，该量表能独立预测结果，并提供了缺血性和出血性卒中的截断值。
items.curatedReasonEn: This multicenter cohort study provides subtype-specific optimal cut-off values for the Berg Balance Scale to predict independent walking at discharge for stroke patients. This will be a powerful tool in your clinical practice for assessing stroke patient prognosis and developing personalized rehabilitation plans.
items.limitation: 研究样本来自韩国的三个康复中心，结果外推到其他国家或人群时需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study sample is from three rehabilitation centers in South Korea, so caution is needed when generalizing the results to other countries or populations.

items.title: Sarcopenia Increases Adjacent Segment Degeneration Risk within 3 Years of Anterior Cervical Discectomy and Fusion.
items.summary: An exploratory retrospective cohort study of 333 adult patients who underwent elective anterior cervical discectomy and fusion (ACDF) from 2012-2022 found that sarcopenia increases the risk of radiographic adjacent segment degeneration development within 3 years.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性队列研究发现肌少症会增加颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术后3年内发生邻近节段退变的风险。这对你识别高危患者和调整术后康复策略具有重要意义。
items.titleZh: 肌少症增加颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术后3年内邻近节段退变的风险
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究分析了333名接受颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术（ACDF）的成年患者数据，发现肌少症会增加术后3年内影像学邻近节段退变（ASD）的风险。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective cohort study found that sarcopenia increases the risk of adjacent segment degeneration within 3 years following anterior cervical discectomy and fusion. This has significant implications for you in identifying high-risk patients and adjusting postoperative rehabilitation strategies.
items.limitation: 回顾性设计可能存在数据不完整和选择偏倚，且主要依赖影像学诊断而非临床症状。
items.limitationEn: The retrospective design may have limitations due to incomplete data and selection bias, and it primarily relies on radiological diagnosis rather than clinical symptoms.

items.title: Multi-Domain Benefits of Exergaming for Sarcopenia Management in Institutionalized Older Adults: Physical, Psychological, and Social Outcomes.
items.summary: A pragmatic quasi-experimental study involving 72 institutionalized older adults with sarcopenia in Taiwan found that a 12-week exergaming intervention (Nintendo Switch Ring Fit Adventure) produced concurrent improvements across physical, psychological, and social domains compared to a control group.
items.curatedReason: 这项准实验研究显示，任天堂Switch Ring Fit Adventure等体感游戏干预能为机构养老的老年肌少症患者带来身体、心理和社交多方面益处。这表明体感游戏可以作为一种有效且可及的康复工具，拓宽你对老年患者的干预手段。
items.titleZh: 体感游戏对机构养老老年肌少症患者的多领域益处：身体、心理和社会结果
items.summaryZh: 一项在台湾进行的准实验研究评估了12周体感游戏干预（任天堂Switch Ring Fit Adventure）对72名机构养老老年肌少症患者的身体、心理和社会结局的有效性。研究发现，体感游戏能同时改善这些领域的状况。
items.curatedReasonEn: This quasi-experimental study demonstrates that exergaming interventions, such as Nintendo Switch Ring Fit Adventure, offer multi-domain benefits—physical, psychological, and social—for institutionalized older adults with sarcopenia. This indicates that exergaming can be an effective and accessible rehabilitation tool, broadening your intervention options for elderly patients.
items.limitation: 作为一项准实验研究，未能完全随机分组，可能存在混杂因素，影响结果的因果推断。
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: Mental health in tennis: a cross-organisational hybrid summit-Delphi consensus process
items.summary: Recommendations for mental healthcare and mental wellness promotion among elite tennis athletes, including juniors, were generated through a multi-method approach involving an in-person summit and an asynchronous Delphi consensus process with 83 participants from governing bodies and the broader tennis ecosystem.
items.curatedReason: 这项通过多方法（包含83名专家）形成的网球心理健康促进建议，为该领域提供了宝贵的共识性框架。我们应采纳这些建议，将其融入对网球运动员的全面照护中，以提升其心理健康水平。
items.titleZh: 网球运动中的心理健康：一项跨组织混合峰会-德尔菲共识流程
items.summaryZh: 通过混合方法（包括一次面对面峰会和异步德尔菲共识流程），83名来自各管理机构及网球生态系统的参与者共同制定了关于精英网球运动员（包括青少年）心理健康护理和促进的建议。
items.curatedReasonEn: These multi-method (83 participants) recommendations for mental health promotion in tennis offer a valuable consensus framework for the field. We should adopt these guidelines and integrate them into our holistic care for tennis athletes to enhance their mental well-being.
items.limitation: 共识性声明本质上是专家意见，并非基于随机对照试验的最高级别证据。
items.limitationEn: Consensus statements are inherently expert opinions, not the highest level of evidence based on randomized controlled trials.

items.title: Incidence of injury and illness at the Paris 2024 Paralympic Games: post-pandemic trends and sport-specific risks
items.summary: A prospective surveillance study monitored 4450 athletes during the 14-day Paris 2024 Paralympic Games, reporting 535 injuries (prevalence 10.9%) and an incidence of 8.6 injuries per 1000 athlete days, with Taekwondo and football 5-a-side having the highest incidences.
items.curatedReason: 这项对2024年巴黎残奥会（4450名运动员）的伤病监测显示，总伤病发生率为10.9%。我们应关注残疾运动员独特的损伤模式，尤其是跆拳道和五人制足球这类高风险项目，以制定更精准的预防和康复策略。
items.titleZh: 2024年巴黎残奥会伤病发生率：后疫情时代趋势与运动特异性风险
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性监测研究在为期14天的2024年巴黎残奥会期间，监测了4450名运动员，报告了535例伤病（患病率10.9%），伤病发生率为每1000运动员日8.6例。跆拳道和五人制足球的发生率最高。
items.curatedReasonEn: This surveillance of the Paris 2024 Paralympics (4450 athletes) reported a total injury prevalence of 10.9%. We should pay attention to the unique injury patterns in para-athletes, particularly in high-risk sports like Taekwondo and football 5-a-side, to develop more precise prevention and rehabilitation strategies.
items.limitation: 作为描述性研究，它报告了伤病发生率但未探讨其原因或干预措施的有效性。
items.limitationEn: As a descriptive study, it reports injury and illness incidence but does not explore their causes or the effectiveness of interventions.

items.title: GaitEncoder: A Foundation Model of Gait Kinematics for Diverse Clinical Applications and Pathologies
items.summary: GaitEncoder, a generative foundation model of gait kinematics, was developed using eight gait datasets (65,000+ videos) and demonstrated potential for diverse clinical applications and pathologies, enabling actionable insights from smartphone-based gait analysis.
items.curatedReason: GaitEncoder模型通过步态运动学基础模型，展示了其在多种临床应用和病理学中的潜力，尤其结合智能手机视频分析。这预示着未来步态分析将更加普及和个性化，能显著提升你评估和治疗运动障碍的效率和精度。
items.titleZh: GaitEncoder：一个用于多种临床应用和病理学的步态运动学基础模型
items.summaryZh: GaitEncoder是一个步态运动学生成式基础模型，利用八个步态数据集（超过65,000个视频）开发，并展示了其在多种临床应用和病理学中的潜力，能够从基于智能手机的步态分析中提取可操作的见解。
items.curatedReasonEn: The GaitEncoder model, based on a foundational model of gait kinematics, demonstrates potential across diverse clinical applications and pathologies, especially with smartphone video analysis. This signals a future where gait analysis is more accessible and personalized, significantly improving your efficiency and precision in assessing and treating movement disorders.
items.limitation: 作为预印本，该研究尚未经过同行评审，结果需谨慎对待。模型的外推性也需在真实世界临床环境中进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: As a preprint, this study has not undergone peer review, and its results should be interpreted with caution. The model's generalizability also requires further validation in real-world clinical settings.

items.title: Cost-effectiveness of Pilates compared with home-based exercises for people with chronic non-specific low back pain: a trial-based economic evaluation.
items.summary: A trial-based economic evaluation found that a Pilates exercise program showed a more favorable cost-effectiveness ratio compared to home-based exercises for individuals with chronic non-specific low back pain in Brazil, though specific effect sizes were not detailed in the abstract.
items.curatedReason: 与家庭锻炼相比，普拉提在治疗慢性非特异性腰痛的成本效益分析中显示出更有利的趋势。这将强化你向患者推广普拉提作为一种有效且具成本效益的治疗选择的信心。
items.titleZh: 普拉提与居家锻炼治疗慢性非特异性腰痛的成本效益：一项基于试验的经济学评估
items.summaryZh: 一项基于随机对照试验的经济学评估发现，在巴西，普拉提运动方案在治疗慢性非特异性腰痛方面，与居家锻炼相比，具有更有利的成本效益。该研究包括普拉提组（n=72）和居家锻炼组（n=73）。
items.curatedReasonEn: Pilates shows a more favorable trend in cost-effectiveness compared to home-based exercises for chronic non-specific low back pain. This strengthens your confidence in promoting Pilates as an effective and cost-efficient treatment option to patients.
items.limitation: 研究样本量相对较小，且仅限于巴西人群，结果外推性受限。
items.limitationEn: The study's relatively small sample size and focus on a Brazilian population limit the generalizability of the findings.

items.title: Acute Modulation of Lumbar Motor Unit Behavior During Experimentally Induced Low Back Pain: A Motor Unit Decomposition Analysis.
items.summary: This study investigated the effects of experimentally induced acute low back pain on force steadiness and motor unit discharge characteristics in 33 healthy participants, revealing specific neuromuscular adaptations during a sustained spinal extension task.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究深入揭示了急性腰痛对运动单位募集和放电模式的具体影响，这有助于你更精细地理解腰痛患者的神经肌肉适应性变化，从而优化评估和干预策略。
items.titleZh: 实验性急性腰痛对腰部运动单位行为的急性调节：一项运动单位分解分析
items.summaryZh: 这项研究通过运动单位分解分析，探讨了实验性急性腰痛对力稳定性及运动单位放电特征（包括募集阈值、放电频率和动作电位振幅）的影响，揭示了33名健康参与者在持续脊柱伸展任务中的具体神经肌肉适应性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study offers detailed insights into the specific effects of acute low back pain on motor unit recruitment and discharge patterns. This will help you refine your understanding of neuromuscular adaptations in low back pain patients, optimizing assessment and intervention strategies.
items.limitation: 研究为实验诱导的急性腰痛，结果可能无法完全代表真实临床情境下的慢性腰痛或自发性急性腰痛。
items.limitationEn: The study involved experimentally induced acute low back pain, so the results may not fully represent chronic or spontaneously occurring acute low back pain in real clinical settings.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Exploration of lifestyle interventions for individuals with knee osteoarthritis: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review explored the range, characteristics, and outcomes of lifestyle interventions for knee osteoarthritis, identifying various assessment measures from 36 studies, including 29 RCTs.
items.curatedReason: 这份范围性综述系统梳理了膝骨关节炎生活方式干预的广度、特征及结局指标。这能帮助你全面了解当前干预策略的多样性，并在临床实践中选择更合适的评估工具。
items.titleZh: 膝骨关节炎个体生活方式干预的探索：一项范围性综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围性综述考察了膝骨关节炎生活方式干预的范围、特征和结果，并识别了所使用的结局测量指标。该综述共纳入36项研究（包括29项随机对照试验）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review systematically maps the breadth, characteristics, and outcome measures of lifestyle interventions for knee OA. This will help you comprehensively understand the diversity of current intervention strategies and select more appropriate assessment tools in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 作为范围性综述，它旨在识别和映射现有文献，而非进行荟萃分析或提供具体干预效果的量化证据。
items.limitationEn: As a scoping review, its purpose is to identify and map existing literature, not to conduct a meta-analysis or provide quantitative evidence of specific intervention effects.
items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: Prevalence, Patterns, Treatment Outcomes and Costs of Physiotherapy-Managed Musculoskeletal Disorders in Nigeria.
items.summary: A 10-year retrospective study of 1582 patients in a Nigerian University Teaching Hospital assessed the prevalence, patterns, treatment effectiveness, and cost of physiotherapy for musculoskeletal disorders.
items.curatedReason: 这项尼日利亚的10年回顾性研究（1582例患者）提供了非洲地区肌肉骨骼疾病物理治疗的数据，提示当地此类疾病患病率、治疗模式、效果和成本。别指望这能直接指导你的临床实践，但它填补了地域数据空白。
items.titleZh: 尼日利亚物理治疗管理肌肉骨骼疾病的患病率、模式、治疗结果和成本
items.summaryZh: 一项为期10年的回顾性研究评估了尼日利亚一家大学教学医院中1582名肌肉骨骼疾病患者的患病率、模式、治疗有效性和成本。患者平均年龄47.8±25.7岁，女性占多数。
items.curatedReasonEn: This 10-year retrospective study (1582 patients) from Nigeria offers data on musculoskeletal physiotherapy in Africa, indicating local prevalence, treatment patterns, effectiveness, and cost. While it won't directly guide your clinical practice, it does fill a significant regional data gap.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性研究，可能存在数据收集不完整或偏倚的局限性，且其结果主要反映尼日利亚单一机构的情况。
items.limitationEn: As a retrospective study, it may have limitations due to incomplete data collection or bias, and its results primarily reflect the situation in a single institution in Nigeria.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Physical therapy protocols for patients with a megaprosthesis after bone tumor resection.
items.summary: This study developed evidence-based physical therapy protocols for patients with megaprostheses after bone tumor resection, through an explorative literature search and two consensus procedures involving orthopedic oncologic surgeons and physical therapists.
items.curatedReason: 该研究提供骨肿瘤切除术后巨型假体患者的物理治疗方案，基于共识和临床实践经验。这对于你处理这类复杂骨科术后康复病例，提供了重要的证据支持和标准化指导。
items.titleZh: 骨肿瘤切除术后巨型假体患者的物理治疗方案
items.summaryZh: 本研究通过探索性文献检索和与骨科肿瘤外科医生及物理治疗师进行的两次共识程序，为骨肿瘤切除术后接受巨型假体重建的患者制定了循证物理治疗方案。最终方案涵盖六种不同巨型假体。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study provides physical therapy protocols for patients with megaprostheses after bone tumor resection, based on consensus and clinical practice experience. This offers crucial evidence-based support and standardized guidance for managing such complex orthopedic postoperative rehabilitation cases.
items.limitation: 协议的制定基于专家共识和初步临床实践，而非随机对照试验，证据等级相对较低。
items.limitationEn: The protocols were developed based on expert consensus and initial clinical practice, not randomized controlled trials, indicating a relatively lower level of evidence.

items.title: In safe hands - patients with knee and hip osteoarthritis expectations and experience of physical therapist-led triage in a secondary care setting.
items.summary: An explorative qualitative study investigated the expectations and experiences of patients with hip or knee osteoarthritis regarding physical therapist-led triage in a Swedish orthopedic clinic.
items.curatedReason: 这项瑞典的定性研究揭示了膝髋骨关节炎患者对物理治疗师主导分诊的期望和体验。在设计分诊流程时，我们应当把患者的这些看法和感受纳入考量，以提升他们的满意度。
items.titleZh: “安心之手”：膝髋骨关节炎患者在二级医疗机构对物理治疗师主导分诊的期望与体验
items.summaryZh: 一项探索性定性研究探讨了瑞典骨科诊所中，膝髋骨关节炎患者对物理治疗师主导分诊的期望和体验。研究发现患者感知到的护理质量良好，但在决策参与度及评估期望满足度上仍有提升空间。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study from Sweden reveals hip and knee OA patients' expectations and experiences with PT-led triage. We should integrate these patient perspectives into triage process design to improve their satisfaction.
items.limitation: 研究为定性设计，样本量小，结果主要反映瑞典特定骨科诊所的患者经验，外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: As a qualitative study with a small sample size, its findings primarily reflect patient experiences at a specific orthopedic clinic in Sweden, limiting generalizability.

items.title: Physical Activity in Women With Obesity: Fatigue, Knee Symptoms, and Functional Capacity.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study of 85 women with obesity examined the adjusted associations of functional capacity, musculoskeletal symptoms, and perceived barriers with total physical activity level.
items.curatedReason: 这项对85名肥胖女性的横断面研究提示，功能能力、肌肉骨骼症状和感知障碍与体力活动水平有关。在为肥胖女性制定运动处方时，应将这些因素纳入考量，以提高依从性。
items.titleZh: 肥胖女性的体力活动：疲劳、膝关节症状和功能能力
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面研究调查了85名肥胖女性的体力活动水平与功能能力、肌肉骨骼症状以及感知障碍之间的关联。研究发现，这些因素与总体力活动水平之间存在相互关系。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study of 85 women with obesity suggests functional capacity, musculoskeletal symptoms, and perceived barriers are associated with physical activity levels. Factor these elements into exercise prescriptions for obese women to improve adherence.
items.limitation: 横断面研究无法确立因果关系，其结果仅能显示变量之间的关联性。
items.limitationEn: As a cross-sectional study, it cannot establish causality; its results only indicate associations between variables.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Sexual function during primary rehabilitation after spinal cord injury: A descriptive analysis from a population-based cohort.
items.summary: A cross-sectional analysis of 605 individuals undergoing primary spinal cord injury rehabilitation in Switzerland described the distribution and risk factors for sexual dysfunction, including altered arousal, orgasmic dysfunction, and menstrual/erectile/ejaculatory dysfunction, at 4.8 months post-SCI.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对脊髓损伤患者性功能障碍的横断面分析提供了关键的人群基线数据。这能帮助你在评估和制定脊髓损伤康复计划时，更系统地纳入性功能评估和咨询，提升患者生活质量。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤初期康复期间的性功能：一项基于人群队列的描述性分析
items.summaryZh: 一项针对瑞士605名脊髓损伤患者的横断面分析描述了初级康复期间性功能障碍及其症状（包括性唤起改变、性高潮障碍、女性月经功能障碍以及男性勃起和射精功能障碍）的分布和风险因素。数据显示，伤后4.8个月，67%的男性和42%的女性报告了性功能障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional analysis of sexual dysfunction in spinal cord injury patients provides crucial baseline population data. This will help you systematically incorporate sexual function assessment and counseling when evaluating and developing rehabilitation plans for SCI patients, improving their quality of life.
items.limitation: 横断面研究仅能描述性功能障碍的分布和风险因素，无法揭示其随时间的变化或干预效果。
items.limitationEn: A cross-sectional study can only describe the distribution and risk factors for sexual dysfunction, not changes over time or the effects of interventions.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Sexual function during primary rehabilitation after spinal cord injury: A descriptive analysis from a population-based cohort

items.title: "My aim is to contribute to a meaningful life." Experiences of physiotherapists treating children and adolescents with cerebral palsy experiencing pain-a qualitative study.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored the experiences of 8 physiotherapists treating children with cerebral palsy experiencing pain, identifying themes like facilitating wellbeing through bodily therapeutic practice and balancing emotional/ethical engagement.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究（8名物理治疗师参与）揭示了治疗伴有疼痛的脑瘫儿童时，物理治疗师面临的复杂性和挑战。它强调了在身体治疗中融入情感和伦理考量的重要性，提示我们在实践中需更具同理心和策略性。
items.titleZh: “我的目标是为有意义的生活做贡献。”物理治疗师治疗伴有疼痛的脑瘫儿童和青少年的经验——一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究通过访谈8名物理治疗师，探讨了他们在治疗伴有疼痛的脑瘫儿童时的经验，以及这些经验如何影响他们的临床实践。研究识别出三个主题，包括通过身体治疗实践促进福祉，以身体经验为中心理解和治疗疼痛，以及基于安全、信任和尊重与儿童建立联盟。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study (8 PTs) highlights the complexities and challenges PTs face when treating children with cerebral palsy who experience pain. It underscores the importance of integrating emotional and ethical considerations into physical therapy, prompting us to be more empathetic and strategic in practice.
items.limitation: 这是一项定性研究，样本量小（8名物理治疗师），结果主要反映受访者的主观经验，而非普遍规律。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study with a small sample size (8 physical therapists); the results primarily reflect the subjective experiences of the interviewees rather than general patterns.

items.title: Building the foundations: organisational leadership for athlete mental health
items.summary: This editorial highlights the importance of organizational leadership in proactively addressing athlete mental health, beyond reactive responses to crises, advocating for a holistic approach to well-being in high-performance environments.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论强调了组织领导力在促进运动员心理健康方面的重要性。它提醒你，在支持运动员身心健康时，除了临床干预，还需要考虑其训练和竞赛环境中的系统性支持。
items.titleZh: 奠定基础：运动员心理健康的组织领导力
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论强调了组织领导力在主动解决运动员心理健康方面的重要性，超越了对危机的被动反应，倡导在高水平运动环境中采用整体福祉方法。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial highlights the importance of organizational leadership in promoting athlete mental health. It reminds you that, in supporting athletes' physical and mental well-being, systemic support within their training and competition environments must be considered alongside clinical interventions.

items.title: An mHealth intervention based on behavior change techniques to promote physical activity and nutrition in older patients with cancer: protocol for an N-of-1 trial
items.summary: This protocol outlines an N-of-1 mHealth intervention trial using an ABA single-subject design to promote physical activity and nutritional behaviors in older cancer patients (≥70 years), combining ecological momentary assessment and accelerometry over 12 weeks.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对老年癌症患者的mHealth干预方案，旨在通过行为改变技术促进体力活动和营养摄入。它为你提供了在特殊人群中探索新型数字康复干预的思路，但在实际应用前需等待试验结果。
items.titleZh: 基于行为改变技术促进老年癌症患者体力活动和营养的mHealth干预：一项N-of-1试验方案
items.summaryZh: 该方案概述了一项N-of-1 mHealth干预试验，采用ABA单受试者设计，旨在通过行为改变技术促进老年癌症患者（≥70岁）的体力活动和营养行为。该试验将结合生态瞬时评估和加速度计进行，为期12周。
items.curatedReasonEn: This N-of-1 trial protocol using mHealth and an ABA design is noteworthy for exploring personalized interventions for physical activity and nutritional behaviors in older cancer patients. However, as a protocol, its results are not yet validated, and direct clinical application is not recommended at this time.
items.limitation: 这是一项N-of-1试验方案，其描述的是研究设计而非最终结果，因此尚无实际临床证据。
items.limitationEn: This is an N-of-1 trial protocol describing the study design, not final results, so there is no actual clinical evidence yet.

items.title: Early Access and Adherence to Physiotherapy in Children With Cerebral Palsy: Hospital-Based Study in Cameroon.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study in Douala, Cameroon, examined factors related to early access (before 5 months of age) and adherence (≥50% of prescribed sessions) to physiotherapy among 94 children with cerebral palsy aged 3 to 60 months, finding that 38.3% accessed care early and 38.3% showed good adherence.
items.curatedReason: 这项喀麦隆的横断面研究（94名脑瘫儿童）提示，仅有38.3%的患儿早期接受物理治疗，且依从性不足。这揭示了低收入地区儿科康复面临的现实障碍，并敦促我们思考如何提升早期干预的可及性和依从性。
items.titleZh: 脑瘫儿童早期物理治疗的可及性和依从性：喀麦隆一项基于医院的研究
items.summaryZh: 一项在喀麦隆杜阿拉进行的横断面研究，调查了94名3至60个月大的脑瘫儿童早期接受（5个月前）和依从（完成≥50%处方疗程）物理治疗服务的相关因素。结果显示，38.3%的儿童早期接受了物理治疗，38.3%表现出良好依从性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study (94 children with CP) in Cameroon indicates only 38.3% accessed early physiotherapy, with adherence also low. It highlights real-world barriers to pediatric rehabilitation in low-income settings and urges us to improve early intervention accessibility and adherence.
items.limitation: 这是一项在喀麦隆单一三级转诊中心进行的横断面研究，结果的外推性受到地理和医疗系统特点的限制。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional study was conducted at a single tertiary referral center in Cameroon, so the generalizability of its findings is limited by geographic and healthcare system specificities.
items.journal: Pediatric physical therapy : the official publication of the Section on Pediatrics of the American Physical Therapy Association

items.title: Prediction of Exercise Intolerance in the Recovery Period After Cardiovascular Surgery Using Perioperative Clinical Parameters.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study of 590 patients in a single cardiac center developed and validated a machine learning model to predict reduced exercise capacity at 3 months post-cardiovascular surgery using perioperative clinical parameters available at hospital discharge.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性队列研究（590例患者）开发了一个利用出院数据预测心血管手术后3个月运动能力下降的机器学习模型。若该模型能进一步验证，它将能帮助我们早期识别高风险患者，从而更早介入康复。
items.titleZh: 利用围手术期临床参数预测心血管手术后恢复期运动不耐受
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究（N=590）开发并验证了一个机器学习模型，用于利用心血管手术患者出院时的临床参数，预测术后3个月的运动能力下降。该研究旨在填补心脏病患者以患者为中心的功能结局预测领域的空白。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective cohort study (590 patients) developed a machine learning model to predict reduced exercise capacity 3 months post-cardiac surgery using discharge parameters. If further validated, this model could help us identify high-risk patients earlier, allowing for more timely rehabilitation interventions.
items.limitation: 机器学习模型的性能高度依赖于训练数据的质量和代表性，且结果可能受到单一心脏中心数据来源的限制。
items.limitationEn: The performance of machine learning models is highly dependent on the quality and representativeness of the training data, and the results may be limited by the single cardiac center data source.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Prediction of Exercise Intolerance in the Recovery Period After Cardiovascular Surgery Using Perioperative Clinical Parameters

items.title: #Beyondthelikes: the influence of social media on athletes mental health
items.summary: This editorial explores the dual impact of social media on athletes' mental health, highlighting both the risks and opportunities within digital spaces, and suggesting directions for future research and practice in this area.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论探讨了社交媒体对运动员心理健康的双重影响，指出风险与机遇并存。作为康复师，我们应认识到数字环境对运动员的潜在影响，并在与其沟通时注意这些因素，甚至可以作为预防干预的切入点。
items.titleZh: #超越点赞：社交媒体对运动员心理健康的影响
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论探讨了社交媒体对运动员心理健康的双重影响，强调了数字空间中的风险与机遇，并提出了该领域未来研究和实践的方向。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial discusses the dual impact of social media on athlete mental health, highlighting both risks and opportunities. As rehabilitation professionals, we should acknowledge the potential influence of digital environments on athletes and consider these factors in our communication and even as a starting point for preventive interventions.

items.title: Towards safer and smarter boxing: technology, health and performance
items.summary: This editorial discusses the potential of technology to enhance safety and performance in professional boxing, advocating for a data-driven approach to manage head impacts and refine training practices beyond intuition.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论讨论了拳击运动中利用技术提升安全性和表现的潜力。它提醒你，即便在传统运动中，数据和科技也正在改变风险管理和训练方法，为康复和损伤预防带来新思路。
items.titleZh: 迈向更安全、更智能的拳击：技术、健康与表现
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论探讨了技术在提高职业拳击安全性和表现方面的潜力，主张采取数据驱动的方法来管理头部冲击，并超越直觉来改进训练实践。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial discusses the potential of technology to enhance safety and performance in boxing. It reminds you that even in traditional sports, data and technology are changing risk management and training methods, bringing new ideas for rehabilitation and injury prevention.

items.title: Infographic. Video analysis of muscle strains in sport: qualitative and quantitative situational characteristics across muscle groups
items.summary: This infographic summarizes qualitative and quantitative situational characteristics of muscle strains in sport through video analysis, aiming to enhance understanding of injury causation for effective prevention and rehabilitation strategies.
items.curatedReason: 这份信息图以视频分析的形式，对运动中肌肉拉伤的定性和定量情境特征进行了总结。这能帮助你直观地理解肌肉损伤机制，从而优化你的损伤预防和康复策略。
items.titleZh: 信息图。运动中肌肉拉伤的视频分析：跨肌肉群的定性和定量情境特征
items.summaryZh: 这份信息图通过视频分析总结了运动中肌肉拉伤的定性和定量情境特征，旨在加深对损伤原因的理解，从而制定有效的预防和康复策略。
items.curatedReasonEn: This infographic summarizes the qualitative and quantitative situational characteristics of muscle strains in sport using video analysis. This will help you visualize muscle injury mechanisms, optimizing your injury prevention and rehabilitation strategies.

items.title: Individual Prognostication of Emergence from Post-Traumatic Amnesia: A Nationwide Cohort Study
items.summary: This nationwide cohort study aims to predict individual emergence from post-traumatic amnesia (PTA) in patients with moderate to severe traumatic brain injury (TBI).
items.curatedReason: 这项观察研究为中重度 TBI 患者的 PTA 恢复预测提供了初步线索，但样本量和方法学限制了其临床决策的指导意义。在有更大样本量和更强设计的研究出现前，请谨慎将此模型应用于个体预后判断。
items.titleZh: 创伤后失忆症恢复的个体化预测：一项全国性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 这项全国性队列研究旨在预测中度至重度创伤性脑损伤（TBI）患者创伤后失忆症（PTA）的个体化恢复时间。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study provides preliminary clues for predicting PTA recovery in moderate to severe TBI patients, but sample size and methodology limit its guidance for clinical decision-making. Until studies with larger sample sizes and stronger designs emerge, use this model cautiously for individual prognosis.
items.limitation: 研究可能受到数据集的局限性影响，例如数据收集的同质性或结局评估的标准化。
items.limitationEn: The study may be affected by dataset limitations, such as homogeneity of data collection or standardization of outcome assessment.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: "If you don't sort out these problems, you end up building problems": a qualitative study exploring mouthcare at home with people with Parkinson's and their partners in care.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored the experiences of 13 people with Parkinson's (PwP) and 7 partners in care regarding home mouthcare activities, identifying themes like maintaining normality and negotiating help.
items.curatedReason: 这项对13名帕金森病患者及其7名照护者的定性研究，揭示了居家口腔护理的挑战。虽然研究聚焦口腔，但它提醒我们关注帕金森病对精细运动和日常自理能力的普遍影响，评估时别漏掉这些看似“次要”的需求。
items.titleZh: “如果你不解决这些问题，最终就会产生更多问题”：一项探索帕金森病患者及其照护伙伴在家进行口腔护理体验的定性研究
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究通过半结构化访谈，探讨了13名帕金森病患者和7名照护伙伴在家中进行口腔护理的经验。研究识别出“维持常态”、“熟悉与意外问题”以及“协商帮助”三个主题，揭示了运动及非运动障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study of 13 PwP and 7 caregivers highlights challenges in home mouthcare. While focused on oral hygiene, it reminds us of Parkinson's pervasive impact on fine motor skills and daily self-care; don't overlook these 'minor' needs during assessment.
items.limitation: 定性研究，样本量小，结果可能不具备广泛代表性，主要聚焦于口腔护理而非整体康复实践。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study with a small sample size, so the results may not be widely representative and primarily focus on mouthcare rather than overall rehabilitation practices.

items.title: On thin ice: balancing Olympic pursuits and long-term health
items.summary: This personal narrative from an Olympic pursuit perspective highlights the critical balance between striving for elite athletic performance and ensuring long-term health and well-being, discussing the physical and psychological demands of high-level sport.
items.curatedReason: 这篇个人叙述探讨了奥运追求与长期健康之间的平衡，从运动员视角揭示了精英体育的挑战。它提醒你，在追求运动表现的同时，也要关注运动员的整体福祉和健康权。
items.titleZh: 如履薄冰：平衡奥运追求与长期健康
items.summaryZh: 这篇来自奥运追求者视角的个人叙述，强调了追求精英运动表现与确保长期健康和福祉之间的关键平衡，讨论了高水平运动对身体和心理的需求。
items.curatedReasonEn: This personal narrative explores the balance between Olympic pursuits and long-term health, revealing the challenges of elite sports from an athlete's perspective. It reminds you to consider athletes' overall well-being and health rights while striving for performance.

items.title: Patient Engagement, Clinical Outcomes, and Satisfaction of an Advanced Orthopedic Virtual Physical Therapy Model: A Retrospective Cohort Study.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study found that an advanced orthopedic virtual physical therapy model achieved high patient engagement and satisfaction, with 70.9% of referred patients completing full care episodes (exceeding national benchmarks of 43%) and 96% achieving Minimal Clinically Important Differences.
items.curatedReason: 远程骨科 PT 模型取得了可观的治疗完成率和临床效果。对于那些寻求扩展远程医疗服务的诊所，这个模型值得深入研究其运营细节，特别是其显著高于全国基准的完成率（71% vs. 43%）。
items.titleZh: 先进骨科远程物理治疗模型的患者参与度、临床结果和满意度：一项回顾性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究发现，先进的骨科远程物理治疗模型获得了较高的患者参与度和满意度，70.9% 的转诊患者完成了全部疗程（高于全国基准的 43%），且 96% 的患者达到了最小临床重要差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This advanced orthopedic virtual PT model achieved remarkable treatment completion rates and clinical outcomes. For clinics looking to expand their telehealth services, this model warrants a deep dive into its operational details, especially its completion rate (71% vs. 43%) which significantly exceeded national benchmarks.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性队列研究，缺乏随机对照，可能存在选择偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This was a retrospective cohort study, lacking randomization and potentially subject to selection bias.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Preoperative physiotherapy and one-year patient-reported outcomes after primary total knee arthroplasty: a registry-based cohort study of 1,688 patients.
items.summary: A registry-based cohort study of 1,688 patients found no significant difference in patient-reported outcomes (KOOS-PS) or pain at 2 months and 1 year post-surgery between patients who received preoperative physiotherapy and those who did not after primary total knee arthroplasty.
items.curatedReason: 这项大样本队列研究提示，术前物理治疗并未在初次全膝关节置换术后患者报告结果和疼痛缓解方面带来显著优势。对于常规实践中是否将术前 PT 作为标准要求，这项数据提供了一个新的视角，尤其是在快通道康复路径下。
items.titleZh: 术前物理治疗与初次全膝关节置换术后一年患者报告结果：一项包含 1,688 名患者的注册研究
items.summaryZh: 一项基于注册数据的 1,688 名患者队列研究发现，在初次全膝关节置换术后 2 个月和 1 年时，接受术前物理治疗的患者与未接受的患者在患者报告结果（KOOS-PS）和疼痛方面没有显著差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This large cohort study suggests that preoperative physical therapy did not offer significant advantages in patient-reported outcomes or pain relief after primary total knee arthroplasty. This data provides a new perspective on whether preoperative PT should be a standard requirement in routine practice, especially within fast-track rehabilitation pathways.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性队列研究，尽管样本量大，但无法排除未测量混杂因素对结果的影响。
items.limitationEn: This was a retrospective cohort study, and despite its large sample size, it cannot exclude the influence of unmeasured confounders on the results.

items.title: Telerehabilitation during the hospital-to-home transition for stroke survivors: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review identified and mapped intervention models, outcome domains, and evidence gaps of telerehabilitation studies for stroke survivors during the hospital-to-home transition, searching PubMed, Web of Science, and Physiotherapy Evidence Database from 2000 onward.
items.curatedReason: 这份范围综述勾勒了卒中患者从医院过渡到家庭期间远程康复的干预模式和结局，为临床实践中应用远程康复提供了地图，并指出了未来的研究空白。
items.titleZh: 卒中幸存者从医院到家庭过渡期的远程康复：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述识别并绘制了卒中幸存者从医院到家庭过渡期间远程康复的干预模型、结局领域和证据空白，检索了 PubMed、Web of Science 和 Physiotherapy Evidence Database 从 2000 年至今的文献。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review outlines the intervention models and outcomes of telerehabilitation for stroke survivors transitioning from hospital to home, providing a roadmap for clinical application and highlighting future research gaps.
items.limitation: 范围综述的性质决定了它只识别和映射现有文献，不进行质量评估或综合效应量计算。
items.limitationEn: Due to its nature, a scoping review only identifies and maps existing literature, without quality assessment or effect size calculation.

items.title: Profile of patients attending private vestibular physiotherapy clinics in Spain: A cross-sectional study.
items.summary: A multicenter cross-sectional study in Spain characterized the demographic, clinical, and healthcare utilization profiles of patients attending private vestibular physiotherapy clinics, highlighting limited access and referrals despite proven efficacy.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对西班牙私人前庭物理治疗诊所患者特征的横断面研究，揭示了前庭康复服务的利用模式。对于关注康复服务可及性和推广的临床医师，该研究提供了关于患者人口统计学、临床和医疗利用情况的基线数据。
items.titleZh: 西班牙私人前庭物理治疗诊所患者概况：一项横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项在西班牙进行的多中心横断面研究描述了就诊于私人前庭物理治疗诊所患者的人口统计学、临床和医疗服务利用情况，强调了尽管疗效已得到证实，但服务可及性和转诊仍有限。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study on patient profiles in Spanish private vestibular physiotherapy clinics sheds light on the utilization patterns of vestibular rehabilitation services. For clinicians concerned with access and promotion of rehabilitation services, this study provides baseline data on patient demographics, clinical characteristics, and healthcare utilization.
items.limitation: 这是一项横断面研究，无法建立因果关系，且数据来自西班牙私人诊所，其结果可能不适用于其他国家或公共医疗系统。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional study, so it cannot establish causality, and the data from private Spanish clinics may not be generalizable to other countries or public healthcare systems.

items.title: Impact of lower limb proprioception on balance and gait in hemiparetic patients: biomechanical analysis.
items.summary: This biomechanical analysis investigated associations between lower extremity proprioceptive impairments (foot sole sensation, position sense, kinesthesia) and objective balance/gait parameters in hemiparetic stroke patients, finding specific relationships that contribute to gait abnormalities and fall risk.
items.curatedReason: 这项生物力学分析揭示了偏瘫患者下肢本体感觉障碍与平衡和步态参数之间的具体关联。这强调了在卒中康复中，应更精细地评估和干预本体感觉缺陷，以期改善步态和降低跌倒风险。
items.titleZh: 下肢本体感觉对偏瘫患者平衡和步态的影响：生物力学分析
items.summaryZh: 这项生物力学分析探讨了偏瘫卒中患者下肢本体感觉障碍（足底感觉、位置觉、动觉）与客观平衡/步态参数之间的关联，发现特定关系导致步态异常和跌倒风险。
items.curatedReasonEn: This biomechanical analysis revealed specific associations between lower limb proprioceptive dysfunction and balance and gait parameters in hemiparetic patients. This emphasizes the need for more precise assessment and intervention for proprioceptive deficits in stroke rehabilitation to improve gait and reduce fall risk.
items.limitation: 这是一项横断面研究，仅能揭示关联性，不能证明本体感觉缺陷是平衡和步态障碍的直接原因。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional study, which can only reveal associations and cannot prove that proprioceptive deficits are direct causes of balance and gait abnormalities.

items.title: Effects of spatial and temporal pre-verbal prioritized instructions on spatiotemporal gait parameters in stroke patients: A within-subject repeated-measures study.
items.summary: A within-subject repeated-measures study of 27 stroke patients found that spatial (matching step length) and temporal (rhythmic counting) pre-verbal prioritized instructions differentially affected spatiotemporal gait parameters compared to a no-prioritization condition.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提供了关于卒中患者步态训练中空间和时间优先口头指令对步态参数影响的证据。在临床实践中，你可以根据患者的具体步态不对称模式，更有针对性地选择是强调步长匹配还是节奏匹配的口头指令。
items.titleZh: 空间和时间优先口头指令对卒中患者时空步态参数的影响：一项受试者内重复测量研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 27 名卒中患者的受试者内重复测量研究发现，与无优先条件相比，空间（匹配步长）和时间（节律性计数）优先的口头指令对时空步态参数产生差异影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study provides evidence on the effects of spatial and temporal prioritized verbal instructions on gait parameters in stroke patients. In clinical practice, you can more specifically choose whether to emphasize step length matching or rhythmic matching verbal instructions based on the patient's specific gait asymmetry pattern.
items.limitation: 研究样本量为 27 名卒中患者，为单中心设计，结果可能受特定人群特征和研究环境影响。
items.limitationEn: The study included 27 stroke patients and was a single-center design, so the results may be influenced by specific population characteristics and the research environment.

items.title: Feasibility of Integrating Music Therapy into Routine Speech-Language Rehabilitation for Post-Stroke Aphasia: A Real-World Outpatient Study.
items.summary: A quasi-experimental outpatient study in Thailand examined the feasibility of integrating a structured music therapy protocol into conventional speech-language therapy for post-stroke aphasia, finding it feasible and showing preliminary improvements in language performance.
items.curatedReason: 这项准实验研究显示，将音乐疗法整合到卒中失语症患者的常规言语康复中是可行的，并可能改善语言表现。对于寻求创新辅助疗法的康复机构，这是一个值得探索的方向，但在全面推广前需要更多高证据等级的研究。
items.titleZh: 将音乐疗法整合到卒中后失语症的常规言语语言康复中的可行性：一项真实世界门诊研究
items.summaryZh: 一项在泰国进行的准实验门诊研究探讨了将结构化音乐疗法方案整合到卒中后失语症常规言语语言治疗中的可行性，发现其可行，并显示出语言表现的初步改善。
items.curatedReasonEn: This quasi-experimental study showed that integrating music therapy into routine speech-language rehabilitation for post-stroke aphasia is feasible and may improve language performance. For rehabilitation facilities seeking innovative adjunctive therapies, this is a promising direction to explore, but more high-level evidence is needed before widespread implementation.
items.limitation: 这是一项准实验研究，缺乏随机分组，且实验组接受了剂量增加的治疗接触时间，难以完全归因于音乐疗法本身的效果。
items.limitationEn: This was a quasi-experimental study lacking randomization, and the experimental group received increased therapeutic contact time, making it difficult to fully attribute effects solely to music therapy.

items.title: Triceps Surae Neuromuscular Activity During Single-leg Jumping Tasks in Individuals After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction.
items.summary: This study compared triceps surae electromyographic (EMG) activity during single-leg jumping tasks between individuals after ACL reconstruction and healthy controls, hypothesizing lower activity in the ACLR group.
items.curatedReason: ACL 重建术后单腿跳跃任务中，小腿三头肌的神经肌肉活动研究对于重返运动（RTS）决策具有启示。如果患者在这些任务中仍显示小腿三头肌活动不足，提示其可能尚未完全恢复，需在训练中加强该肌群的专项训练，以降低再损伤风险。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建术后个体单腿跳跃任务中小腿三头肌神经肌肉活动
items.summaryZh: 这项研究比较了前交叉韧带重建术后个体与健康对照组在单腿跳跃任务中小腿三头肌的肌电图（EMG）活动，假设 ACLR 组的活动较低。
items.curatedReasonEn: The study on triceps surae neuromuscular activity during single-leg jumping tasks after ACL reconstruction is insightful for Return-to-Sport (RTS) decisions. If patients still exhibit insufficient triceps surae activity during these tasks, it suggests they may not have fully recovered, and specific training for this muscle group should be emphasized to reduce re-injury risk.
items.limitation: 样本量较小，研究结果可能受到个体差异的影响。
items.limitationEn: The sample size was small, and the results might be affected by individual variations.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Eight weeks of visual perturbation training effects on unanticipated cutting lower-limb biomechanics and errors in male athletes following anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction: a randomized controlled clinical trial (RCT).
items.summary: An RCT of 24 ACLR male athletes who had returned to sport found that 8 weeks of visual perturbation training improved unanticipated cutting lower-limb biomechanics and reduced errors, addressing neuromuscular deficits beyond standard return-to-sport protocols.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 表明，在 ACLR 后返回运动的男性运动员中，进行 8 周的视觉扰动训练能改善无预兆切向运动的下肢生物力学和错误率。这意味着你可以考虑将视觉扰动训练纳入高级康复阶段，特别是针对需要快速决策和复杂运动控制的运动员，以更好地应对竞技需求并降低再损伤风险。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建术后男性运动员 8 周视觉扰动训练对无预兆切向运动下肢生物力学和错误率的影响：一项随机对照临床试验 (RCT)
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 24 名 ACLR 术后已重返运动的男性运动员的 RCT 发现，8 周的视觉扰动训练改善了无预兆切向运动的下肢生物力学并减少了错误，弥补了标准重返运动方案之外的神经肌肉缺陷。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT indicates that 8 weeks of visual perturbation training improves lower-limb biomechanics and error rates during unanticipated cutting maneuvers in male athletes who have returned to sport after ACLR. This means you can consider incorporating visual perturbation training into advanced rehabilitation, especially for athletes requiring rapid decision-making and complex motor control, to better meet competitive demands and reduce re-injury risk.
items.limitation: 研究仅限于男性运动员，结果不一定完全适用于女性运动员；样本量相对较小，需要更大规模的 RCT 来进一步确认。
items.limitationEn: The study was limited to male athletes, so the results may not be fully applicable to female athletes; the sample size was relatively small, and larger RCTs are needed for further confirmation.

items.title: Factors Affecting Clinical Decision Making for Blood Flow Restriction Training in Pediatric and Adolescent Patients Following Anterior Cruciate Ligament Injury.
items.summary: A cross-sectional survey investigated factors affecting physical therapists' clinical decision-making for blood flow restriction training (BFRT) in pediatric and adolescent patients following ACL injury, aiming to understand the concordance between research and clinical practice.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对物理治疗师在 ACL 损伤后儿科和青少年患者中实施血流限制训练（BFRT）的调查，揭示了临床决策的影响因素。如果你考虑在青少年患者中使用 BFRT，这项研究提供了临床实践与研究证据之间差距的初步洞察，提醒你需要关注患者的临床表现和当前的循证实践指南。
items.titleZh: 影响前交叉韧带损伤后儿科和青少年患者血流限制训练临床决策的因素
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面调查研究探讨了影响物理治疗师对 ACL 损伤后儿科和青少年患者实施血流限制训练（BFRT）临床决策的因素，旨在了解研究与临床实践之间的一致性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey on physical therapists' implementation of blood flow restriction training (BFRT) in pediatric and adolescent patients after ACL injury reveals factors influencing clinical decision-making. If you are considering using BFRT in adolescent patients, this study provides preliminary insights into the gap between clinical practice and research evidence, reminding you to pay attention to the patient's clinical presentation and current evidence-based practice guidelines.
items.limitation: 这是一项横断面调查研究，依赖于物理治疗师的自报告，可能存在回忆偏倚和报告偏倚，不能完全反映实际的临床实践。
items.limitationEn: This was a cross-sectional survey study relying on self-reports from physical therapists, which may have recall and reporting biases and may not fully reflect actual clinical practice.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Effects of Dynamic Taping on Dynamic Balance and Proprioception in Recreational Athletes with Chronic Ankle Instability.
items.summary: A single-blind randomized controlled trial of 28 recreational athletes with chronic ankle instability compared immediate effects of Dynamic Taping (DT) and Sports Taping (ST) on dynamic balance and proprioception, finding comparable improvements.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 提示，动态贴扎在慢性踝关节不稳患者的动态平衡和本体感觉改善方面可能与传统运动贴扎效果相当。你可以将动态贴扎作为传统运动贴扎的替代或补充，特别是在需要保持功能性运动范围的场景下。
items.titleZh: 动态贴扎对慢性踝关节不稳娱乐性运动员动态平衡和本体感觉的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 28 名慢性踝关节不稳娱乐性运动员的单盲随机对照试验比较了动态贴扎（DT）和运动贴扎（ST）对动态平衡和本体感觉的即时影响，发现两者改善效果相当。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT suggests that dynamic taping may be comparable to traditional sports taping in improving dynamic balance and proprioception in recreational athletes with chronic ankle instability. You can consider dynamic taping as an alternative or supplement to traditional sports taping, especially in situations where functional range of motion needs to be maintained.
items.limitation: 研究样本量仅为 28 名娱乐性运动员，随访时间仅为即时效应，缺乏长期效果评估。
items.limitationEn: The study sample size was only 28 recreational athletes, and it assessed immediate effects, lacking long-term outcome evaluation.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Biomechanical effects of Kinesio versus Mulligan ankle taping on balance and ankle function in chronic STROKE: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial of 33 chronic stroke individuals compared Kinesio taping with treadmill training, Mulligan taping with treadmill training, and treadmill training alone, finding significant group differences in ankle dorsiflexion passive range of motion, balance, and ankle stability after six weeks.
items.curatedReason: 这项有 33 名慢性卒中患者参与的 RCT 提示，Kinesio 贴扎或 Mulligan 贴扎联合跑步机训练，在改善踝关节背屈 ROM、平衡和踝关节稳定性方面，优于单纯跑步机训练。在慢性卒中康复中，可考虑将贴扎技术作为提升踝关节功能、降低跌倒风险的有效辅助手段。
items.titleZh: Kinesio 与 Mulligan 踝关节贴扎对慢性卒中患者平衡和踝关节功能的生物力学影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 33 名慢性卒中患者的随机对照试验比较了 Kinesio 贴扎联合跑步机训练、Mulligan 贴扎联合跑步机训练以及单纯跑步机训练，发现六周后在踝关节背屈被动活动度、平衡和踝关节稳定性方面存在显著组间差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT with 33 chronic stroke patients suggests that Kinesio or Mulligan taping combined with treadmill training is superior to treadmill training alone for improving ankle dorsiflexion ROM, balance, and ankle stability. In chronic stroke rehabilitation, consider taping techniques as an effective adjunct to enhance ankle function and reduce fall risk.
items.limitation: 研究样本量相对较小（每组 11 人），可能影响结果的普遍性，且未报告盲法执行情况。
items.limitationEn: The study had a relatively small sample size (11 participants per group), which might limit the generalizability of the results, and did not report blinding procedures.

items.title: Monitoring an athletes performance-state after they return to sport is a significant challenge in ACL injury research and applied practice
items.summary: Introduction An anterior cruciate ligament (ACL) injury carries one of the highest injury burdens in sport 1 and anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction (ACLR) involves a prolonged post-operative re
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论强调了 ACL 损伤后运动员重返运动（RTS）后表现状态监测的挑战。你需要认识到通过 RTS 标准的运动员仍有长期神经肌肉和运动表现障碍，因此在临床实践中，持续的、更全面的性能监测至关重要，而不仅仅是关注 RTS 决策本身。
items.titleZh: ACL 损伤后运动员重返运动后的表现状态监测是研究和实践中的一大挑战
items.summaryZh: 一篇社论指出，前交叉韧带（ACL）损伤后运动员重返运动（RTS）后的表现状态监测在 ACL 损伤研究和实际应用中是一个重大挑战，运动员即使达到 RTS 标准，仍可能面临长期神经肌肉和运动表现障碍，且再损伤风险增加。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial highlights the challenges of monitoring an athlete's performance state after return to sport (RTS) following ACL injury. You need to recognize that athletes who meet RTS criteria may still have long-term neuromuscular and sport performance impairments. Therefore, continuous, more comprehensive performance monitoring is crucial in clinical practice, beyond just the RTS decision itself.

items.title: Factors associated with return-to-sport outcomes following pathogen-confirmed acute respiratory infections in athletes: AWARE X study
items.summary: A prospective cohort study of 114 athletes with confirmed acute respiratory infections identified factors associated with return-to-sport (RTS) outcomes. Illness severity was significantly associated with time to return-to-training, return-to-full-training, and return-to-full-performance, with median days to RTT, RTFT, and RTFP being 3.5, 8, and 11 respectively.
items.curatedReason: 对于急性呼吸道感染后的运动员，疾病严重程度与重返训练（中位 3.5 天）、全面训练（中位 8 天）和全面表现（中位 11 天）的时间显著相关。在管理这些运动员时，你需要密切关注其疾病严重程度，以便更准确地预测和指导他们安全重返运动。
items.titleZh: 病原体确诊急性呼吸道感染后运动员重返运动结局相关因素：AWARE X 研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 114 名确诊急性呼吸道感染运动员的前瞻性队列研究识别了重返运动（RTS）结局的相关因素。疾病严重程度与恢复训练、恢复完全训练和恢复完全表现的时间显著相关，中位恢复训练时间为 3.5 天，恢复完全训练为 8 天，恢复完全表现为 11 天。
items.curatedReasonEn: For athletes post-acute respiratory infection, illness severity is significantly linked to return-to-training (median 3.5 days), full training (median 8 days), and full performance (median 11 days) times. When managing these athletes, you must closely monitor illness severity to accurately predict and guide their safe return to sport.
items.limitation: 研究样本量为 114 例，可能受特定运动员群体和感染类型的影响，外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: The study included 114 cases, which may be influenced by specific athlete populations and infection types, limiting generalizability.

items.title: "Most inactive in my life": patient-reported barriers to cardiac rehabilitation in heart failure.
items.summary: A qualitative study using in-depth interviews with 22 heart failure patients (aged 27-85) identified patient-reported barriers and facilitators to cardiac rehabilitation participation, highlighting underutilization despite guideline concordance.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究揭示了心力衰竭患者参与心脏康复的患者报告障碍和促进因素。你应关注患者的个体化需求、心理因素（如抑郁症状和感知压力）以及实际障碍，以便更好地定制康复方案，提高心脏康复的依从性和利用率。
items.titleZh: “我一生中最不活跃的时候”：患者报告的心力衰竭心脏康复障碍
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 22 名心力衰竭患者（27-85 岁）的定性研究，通过深入访谈，识别了患者报告的心脏康复参与障碍和促进因素，强调了尽管符合指南，但利用率仍然不足。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study reveals patient-reported barriers and facilitators to cardiac rehabilitation in heart failure patients. You should pay attention to patients' individualized needs, psychological factors (such as depressive symptoms and perceived stress), and practical barriers to better tailor rehabilitation programs and improve adherence and utilization of cardiac rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 这是一项定性研究，样本量较小（22 名患者），主要提供深入的观点而非普适性的统计结果。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study with a small sample size (22 patients), providing in-depth perspectives rather than generalizable statistical results.

items.title: Validity and reliability of on‑site and off‑site direct observation of procedural skills (DOPS) for knee mobilization in Physical therapy education.
items.summary: This study validated the direct observation of procedural skills for knee joint mobilization (DOPSknee) tool, finding good on-site inter-rater reliability among 42 preclinical PT students, supporting its use for assessing preclinical competencies in physical therapy education.
items.curatedReason: 对于物理治疗教育工作者来说，DOPSknee 工具在校内和校外环境中的效度和信度数据提供了将其整合到教学评估中的依据。考虑在技能培训和考核中引入该工具，以确保评估的一致性和有效性。
items.titleZh: 膝关节松动术程序技能直接观察（DOPSknee）工具在物理治疗教育中校内和校外应用的效度和信度
items.summaryZh: 这项研究验证了膝关节松动术程序技能直接观察（DOPSknee）工具的效度和信度，发现其在 42 名临床前物理治疗学生中表现出良好的校内评估者间信度，支持其在物理治疗教育中评估临床前能力的应用。
items.curatedReasonEn: For physical therapy educators, the validity and reliability data for the DOPSknee tool in both on-site and off-site settings provide a basis for integrating it into instructional assessments. Consider introducing this tool in skill training and evaluation to ensure assessment consistency and effectiveness.
items.limitation: 研究仅限于膝关节松动术的评估，可能不适用于其他关节或操作。
items.limitationEn: The study was limited to knee joint mobilization assessment and may not be generalizable to other joints or procedures.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: TRAK MSK: a randomised external feasibility trial and process evaluation of a digital physiotherapy supported self-management programme for people with musculoskeletal pain.
items.summary: A two-arm multi-site randomized external feasibility trial of TRAK MSK, a digital physiotherapy supported self-management program for musculoskeletal pain, explored the feasibility of conducting a definitive trial. Participants with activity-related joint pain for at least 3 months were randomized to TRAK MSK or usual NHS physiotherapy care.
items.curatedReason: 对于正在探索数字疗法用于肌骨疼痛管理的诊所，TRAK MSK 的可行性试验提示这种支持性的数字自我管理方案有望作为常规 PT 的补充或替代。等待后续更大规模的定性试验。
items.titleZh: TRAK MSK：一项针对肌肉骨骼疼痛患者的数字物理治疗支持的自我管理项目随机外部可行性试验和过程评估
items.summaryZh: TRAK MSK 是一项针对肌肉骨骼疼痛患者的数字物理治疗支持的自我管理项目。一项两臂多中心随机外部可行性试验探索了开展明确试验的可行性。患有至少 3 个月活动相关关节疼痛的参与者被随机分配到 TRAK MSK 干预组或常规 NHS 物理治疗护理组。
items.curatedReasonEn: For clinics exploring digital therapeutics for musculoskeletal pain management, the feasibility trial of TRAK MSK suggests that such a supported digital self-management program could be a promising complement or alternative to usual PT. Await larger definitive trials.
items.limitation: 这是一项可行性试验，样本量小，主要关注研究方法的可行性而非干预的最终疗效。
items.limitationEn: This was a feasibility trial with a small sample size, primarily focusing on methodological feasibility rather than definitive intervention efficacy.

items.title: Major discrepancies in recommendations regarding long-term activity restrictions following knee replacement: a survey among Swedish physiotherapists.
items.summary: A survey of Swedish physiotherapists revealed major discrepancies in recommendations for long-term activity restrictions after knee replacement surgery, indicating a lack of consensus in clinical practice.
items.curatedReason: 膝关节置换术后长期活动限制缺乏统一证据支持，导致瑞典物理治疗师的建议差异巨大。这提醒你，在实践中应与患者充分沟通不确定性，并关注个体化需求，等待更明确的指南。
items.titleZh: 膝关节置换术后长期活动限制建议存在重大差异：瑞典物理治疗师调查
items.summaryZh: 一项针对瑞典物理治疗师的调查显示，膝关节置换术后长期活动限制的建议存在重大差异，表明临床实践中缺乏共识。
items.curatedReasonEn: The lack of consistent evidence for long-term activity restrictions after knee replacement leads to significant variation in recommendations by Swedish physiotherapists. This highlights the need to communicate uncertainties with patients and focus on individualized needs, awaiting clearer guidelines.
items.limitation: 研究基于瑞典物理治疗师的自填问卷，可能存在回忆偏倚和文化特异性，不一定完全代表其他国家的实践。
items.limitationEn: The study relied on self-reported questionnaires from Swedish physiotherapists, which may have recall bias and cultural specificity, potentially not fully representative of practices in other countries.

items.title: Incomplete Cognitive Assessment in Post-Acute Stroke Rehabilitation: Recovering Clinically Interpretable Relationships from Routine Neuropsychological Data.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study of 2654 post-acute stroke patients demonstrated that incomplete routine neuropsychological data can still yield clinically interpretable relationships among cognitive, clinical, and contextual variables, supporting group-level stratification.
items.curatedReason: 该研究提示，即使在不完全的认知评估数据下，仍能从常规神经心理学数据中恢复有临床意义的关系。这对于卒中康复机构在评估资源有限时，如何从现有数据中提取最大价值具有指导意义。
items.titleZh: 急性后期卒中康复中不完全认知评估：从常规神经心理学数据中恢复临床可解释的关系
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 2654 名急性后期卒中患者的回顾性队列研究表明，不完整的常规神经心理学数据仍能揭示认知、临床和情境变量之间具有临床可解释的关系，支持了组水平分层。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study suggests that clinically interpretable relationships can still be recovered from routine neuropsychological data even with incomplete cognitive assessment data. This provides guidance for stroke rehabilitation facilities on how to extract maximum value from existing data when assessment resources are limited.
items.limitation: 回顾性队列研究可能存在数据缺失模式带来的偏倚，且恢复的“临床可解释关系”可能不如完整数据分析全面和精确。
items.limitationEn: The retrospective cohort study may have bias due to missing data patterns, and the recovered "clinically interpretable relationships" may not be as comprehensive or precise as those from complete data analysis.

items.title: Enhanced Gait Variability Index in Neurological and Geriatric Rehabilitation: A Scoping Review.
items.summary: A scoping review mapped the application of the Enhanced Gait Variability Index (eGVI) in neurological and geriatric populations, identifying its potential as a composite measure for multidimensional gait irregularity, while also highlighting assessment protocol heterogeneity and methodological gaps.
items.curatedReason: 这份范围综述突出了增强步态变异性指数（eGVI）作为神经和老年康复中步态不规则性综合评估工具的潜力。如果你正在寻找更精细、多维度的步态评估工具，eGVI 值得深入研究，但请注意其标准化应用仍存在方法学空白。
items.titleZh: 神经和老年康复中增强步态变异性指数的应用：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述绘制了增强步态变异性指数（eGVI）在神经和老年人群中的应用，确认其作为多维步态不规则性复合测量指标的潜力，同时强调了评估方案的异质性和方法学空白。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review highlights the potential of the Enhanced Gait Variability Index (eGVI) as a comprehensive assessment tool for gait irregularity in neurological and geriatric rehabilitation. If you are looking for a more refined, multidimensional gait assessment tool, eGVI is worth exploring, but note that methodological gaps still exist in its standardized implementation.
items.limitation: 范围综述的性质决定了它只识别和映射现有文献，不进行质量评估或综合效应量计算。
items.limitationEn: Due to its nature, a scoping review only identifies and maps existing literature, without quality assessment or effect size calculation.

items.title: The use of focus of attention for instruction and feedback during telehealth physiotherapy: An observational study.
items.summary: An exploratory observational study examined pediatric physiotherapists' use of focus of attention (FOA) for instructions and feedback during telehealth for children with neurodevelopmental disorders, involving six physiotherapists and twelve clients from two therapy centers.
items.curatedReason: 儿科物理治疗师在远程医疗中使用“关注焦点”指令和反馈的方式，是优化远程康复教学策略的关键。你应该在远程干预中更系统地应用不同类型的关注焦点，以期提高患儿的学习效果。
items.titleZh: 远程医疗物理治疗中指令和反馈的注意焦点使用：一项观察性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项探索性观察研究考察了儿科物理治疗师在远程医疗中向神经发育障碍儿童提供指令和反馈时注意焦点（FOA）的使用情况，研究涉及来自两个治疗中心的六名物理治疗师和十二名患儿。
items.curatedReasonEn: How pediatric physiotherapists use focus of attention instructions and feedback in telehealth is key to optimizing telerehabilitation teaching strategies. You should more systematically apply different types of focus of attention in tele-interventions to potentially improve children's learning outcomes.
items.limitation: 样本量较小（6 名物理治疗师，12 名患儿），且为探索性观察研究，外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: The sample size was small (6 physiotherapists, 12 children), and it was an exploratory observational study with limited generalizability.

items.title: Early-Stage Symptomatic Hip Osteoarthritis: A Window of Opportunity.
items.summary: This commentary highlights the growing prevalence of hip osteoarthritis in young adults and emphasizes the importance of identifying early-stage symptomatic hip OA as a critical 'window of opportunity' for interventions to slow or change its trajectory.
items.curatedReason: 年轻成人髋骨关节炎日益普遍，早期识别症状性髋骨关节炎至关重要。这提供了一个“机会窗口”进行干预，以减缓或改变疾病进展。你应该警惕年轻患者的髋关节不适，及早评估。
items.titleZh: 早期症状性髋骨关节炎：一个干预良机
items.summaryZh: 这篇述评强调了年轻成人髋骨关节炎日益增长的流行率，并着重指出识别早期症状性髋骨关节炎是减缓或改变其病程轨迹的关键“干预良机”。
items.curatedReasonEn: Hip osteoarthritis in young adults is increasingly prevalent; early identification of symptomatic hip OA is crucial. This offers a 'window of opportunity' for interventions to slow or alter disease progression. You should be vigilant for hip discomfort in younger patients and assess early.
items.limitation: 这是一篇述评，不提供原始研究数据，主要基于专家意见和现有文献回顾，证据等级不高。
items.limitationEn: This is a commentary, offering no original research data and primarily based on expert opinion and existing literature reviews, thus not providing a high level of evidence.
items.journal: The Journal of orthopaedic and sports physical therapy

items.title: Exercise-based cancer telerehabilitation is safe but not superior to a single session of physiotherapy for improving quality of life: a randomised trial.
items.summary: An assessor-blinded randomized controlled trial found that 8 weeks of physiotherapist-led group exercise-based telerehabilitation was safe but not superior to a single session of in-person assessment and advice for improving health-related quality of life in cancer survivors.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 揭示了基于运动的癌症远程康复在改善生活质量方面并不优于单次物理治疗评估和建议。这提示你，远程集体运动虽然安全，但在特定结局（如生活质量）上，其效应可能不如预期。你需要仔细权衡远程运动康复的价值，并关注其可能更适用于哪些特定目标（如活动能力、功能等），而非笼统地认为其在所有方面都优于简短的面对面干预。
items.titleZh: 基于运动的癌症远程康复是安全的，但在改善生活质量方面并不优于单次物理治疗：一项随机试验
items.summaryZh: 一项评估者设盲的随机对照试验发现，为期 8 周的物理治疗师主导的基于运动的远程康复是安全的，但在改善癌症幸存者健康相关生活质量方面并不优于单次面对面评估和建议。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT reveals that exercise-based cancer telerehabilitation is not superior to a single session of physical therapy assessment and advice for improving quality of life. This suggests that while remote group exercise is safe, its effect on specific outcomes (e.g., quality of life) may not be as expected. You need to carefully weigh the value of telerehabilitation for exercise, focusing on specific targets (e.g., mobility, function) it might be more suitable for, rather than assuming it's superior to brief in-person interventions in all aspects.
items.limitation: 研究仅比较了为期 8 周的干预，长期效果尚不明确。此外，对照组的“单次评估和建议”干预强度较低，可能存在对照设计上的局限。
items.limitationEn: The study only compared an 8-week intervention, so long-term effects are unclear. Additionally, the control group's "single session of assessment and advice" had low intervention intensity, which might be a limitation in the control design.

items.title: Sudden cardiac arrest preparedness in African football: evidence from Cameroon and implications for global sport
items.summary: A cross-sectional survey assessed the knowledge, attitudes, and practices regarding sudden cardiac arrest (SCA) preparedness among professional football stakeholders in Cameroon during the 2024/2025 season, identifying system-level gaps in low-resource sport settings.
items.curatedReason: 这项关于喀麦隆职业足球界猝死准备情况的调查，揭示了低资源环境下应对运动相关猝死的知识、态度和实践差距。这提示你在考虑非洲或其他低资源地区运动康复服务时，需重视紧急救治流程和培训，这是保障运动员安全的基础。
items.titleZh: 非洲足球猝死准备情况：喀麦隆的证据及对全球体育的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面调查评估了 2024/2025 赛季喀麦隆职业足球利益相关者对猝死（SCA）准备情况的知识、态度和实践，识别了低资源体育环境下的系统性差距。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey on sudden cardiac arrest preparedness in Cameroonian professional football reveals gaps in knowledge, attitudes, and practices in low-resource settings. This suggests that when considering sports rehabilitation services in Africa or other low-resource regions, you need to prioritize emergency care procedures and training, which are fundamental to athlete safety.
items.limitation: 研究仅限于喀麦隆职业足球界，结果的普适性可能有限，尤其是在资源更丰富的国家。
items.limitationEn: The study was limited to professional football stakeholders in Cameroon, so the generalizability of the results may be limited, especially in more resourced countries.

items.title: Figure-of-Eight Taping Combined with Rehabilitation for Multidirectional Shoulder Instability in a School-Age Female Karate Athlete: A Case Report.
items.summary: A case report of a 12-year-old female karate athlete with multidirectional shoulder instability (MDI) demonstrated that figure-of-eight taping effectively facilitated exercise therapy, improving comfort and enabling targeted strengthening.
items.curatedReason: 虽然只是个案报告，但对于儿童武术运动员的多向肩关节不稳，八字贴扎技术可能辅助运动疗法，提高患者舒适度并实现更有针对性的肌力训练。在特定病例中，可尝试作为一种辅助手段。
items.titleZh: 八字贴扎联合康复治疗学龄期女性空手道运动员多向肩关节不稳：一例病例报告
items.summaryZh: 一例 12 岁女性空手道运动员多向肩关节不稳（MDI）的病例报告显示，八字贴扎有效促进了运动疗法，改善了舒适度并实现了针对性强化。
items.curatedReasonEn: Though a case report, figure-of-eight taping may assist exercise therapy for multidirectional shoulder instability in child martial artists, improving comfort and enabling targeted strengthening. Consider it as an adjunctive measure in specific cases.
items.limitation: 这是一个单例报告，证据等级低，结果外推性非常有限。
items.limitationEn: This is a single case report with a low level of evidence and very limited generalizability.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Physiotherapists' knowledge, attitude and practice of motor learning in stroke rehabilitation.
items.summary: A survey of 40 South African physiotherapists described their knowledge, attitudes, and practices regarding motor learning in stroke rehabilitation, revealing a wide spread of respondents' main areas of interest.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对南非物理治疗师关于卒中康复中运动学习知识、态度和实践的研究，虽然样本量较小，但提示了该领域潜在的知识差距。这对于制定有针对性的继续教育项目，以优化卒中康复方案，可能具有参考价值。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗师在卒中康复中运动学习的知识、态度和实践
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 40 名南非物理治疗师的调查描述了他们在卒中康复中运动学习的知识、态度和实践，揭示了受访者主要兴趣领域广泛分布。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study on South African physiotherapists' knowledge, attitude, and practice of motor learning in stroke rehabilitation, despite its small sample size, suggests potential knowledge gaps in the field. This may be valuable for developing targeted continuing education programs to optimize stroke rehabilitation protocols.
items.limitation: 研究样本量仅为 40 人，且采用方便和滚雪球抽样，代表性不足，结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: The study sample size was only 40, and convenient and snowball sampling were used, leading to insufficient representativeness and limited generalizability.
items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: Utilization of physiotherapy services and associated factors among stroke survivors attending hospitals in Gondar Town, Northwest Ethiopia.
items.summary: An institution-based cross-sectional study in Gondar Town, Northwest Ethiopia, assessed physiotherapy service utilization and associated factors among stroke survivors, finding that physiotherapy plays a vital role in improving mobility and quality of life.
items.curatedReason: 这项在埃塞俄比亚进行的研究提示，卒中幸存者的物理治疗服务利用率不足，凸显了低收入国家在康复服务可及性方面面临的挑战。了解这些数据有助于我们审视全球康复服务的公平性和可及性问题。
items.titleZh: 埃塞俄比亚西北部贡德尔镇卒中幸存者物理治疗服务利用情况及相关因素
items.summaryZh: 埃塞俄比亚西北部贡德尔镇一项基于机构的横断面研究评估了卒中幸存者物理治疗服务的利用情况及相关因素，发现物理治疗在改善活动能力和生活质量方面发挥着至关重要的作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This Ethiopian study indicates underutilization of physiotherapy services among stroke survivors, highlighting challenges in rehabilitation service access in low-income countries. Understanding these data helps us examine global equity and accessibility in rehabilitation services.
items.limitation: 这是一项在埃塞俄比亚特定城镇进行的横断面研究，结果可能不适用于其他地区或高收入国家的卒中患者。
items.limitationEn: This was a cross-sectional study conducted in a specific town in Ethiopia, and the results may not be generalizable to other regions or stroke patients in high-income countries.

items.title: The effect of exercise on clinical pain: a systematic umbrella review and meta-meta-analysis
items.summary: An umbrella review and meta-meta-analysis synthesized evidence from 11 databases, confirming the consistent and significant analgesic effects of exercise across various pain conditions and exercise modalities.
items.curatedReason: 这是运动镇痛效应的最高级别证据。无论何种疼痛类型或运动方式，运动疗法作为一线干预的地位得到进一步巩固。在临床实践中，你应该坚定地向患者推荐运动治疗，并根据具体情况选择合适的运动方案。
items.titleZh: 运动对临床疼痛影响的系统性伞形综述和荟萃再分析
items.summaryZh: 一项伞形综述和荟萃再分析综合了 11 个数据库的证据，证实了运动对各种疼痛状况和运动模式均具有持续且显著的镇痛作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is the highest level of evidence for exercise-induced analgesia. The role of exercise therapy as a first-line intervention is further solidified, regardless of pain type or exercise modality. In clinical practice, you should confidently recommend exercise to patients, tailoring the program to their specific condition.
items.limitation: 伞形综述的局限性在于其纳入的原始研究异质性可能较高，且效应量可能因底层研究设计而异。
items.limitationEn: Limitations of umbrella reviews include potential high heterogeneity among included primary studies and variability in effect sizes due to underlying study designs.

items.title: Pelvic floor muscle training for pelvic organ prolapse: A systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials confirmed the efficacy of pelvic floor muscle training for pelvic organ prolapse, demonstrating significant improvements in prolapse symptoms and quality of life.
items.curatedReason: 盆底肌训练（PFMT）作为盆腔器官脱垂（POP）的一线保守治疗，其有效性在这项高质量系统综述和荟萃分析中得到再次确认。你可以坚定地向符合条件的患者推荐并指导PFMT，它是改善症状和生活质量的有效手段。
items.titleZh: 盆底肌训练对盆腔器官脱垂的疗效：一项随机对照试验的系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验的系统综述和荟萃分析证实了盆底肌训练对盆腔器官脱垂的疗效，显示其能显著改善脱垂症状和生活质量。
items.curatedReasonEn: Pelvic floor muscle training (PFMT) is re-confirmed as an effective first-line conservative treatment for pelvic organ prolapse (POP) by this high-quality systematic review and meta-analysis. You should confidently recommend and guide PFMT for eligible patients, as it is an effective means of improving symptoms and quality of life.
items.limitation: 尽管证据级别较高，但盆底肌训练的长期依从性和不同脱垂分期的疗效差异仍需更多研究明确。
items.limitationEn: Despite high-level evidence, the long-term adherence to PFMT and its varying efficacy across different prolapse stages still require further research.

items.title: APTA Report Finds Demand for Pelvic Health Physical Therapy Outpaces Access
items.summary: A new APTA report, "APTA State of Pelvic Health Physical Therapy," reveals that the demand for pelvic health physical therapy in the U.S. significantly outpaces access, highlighting workforce, access, and awareness challenges.
items.curatedReason: APTA 的这份报告揭示了美国盆底物理治疗的巨大供需缺口。在执业中，这表示你所在地区的盆底 PT 服务可能需求旺盛，可考虑进一步深耕该领域，并关注相关政策动态以优化服务供给。同时，报告也强调了提高公众认知的重要性。
items.titleZh: APTA 报告指出：美国盆底物理治疗供不应求
items.summaryZh: 美国物理治疗协会（APTA）最新报告《APTA 盆底物理治疗现状》显示，美国盆底物理治疗的需求远超供给，凸显了劳动力、可及性和公众认知方面的挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: This APTA report highlights a significant supply-demand gap in pelvic health physical therapy in the U.S. In practice, this suggests strong demand for pelvic PT services in your area, and you might consider specializing further in this field, while also monitoring policy changes to optimize service delivery. The report also emphasizes the importance of increasing public awareness.

items.title: Effectiveness of non-pharmacological interventions for lower limb motor impairment in post-stroke hemiplegia: a systematic review and Bayesian network meta-analysis | Journal of NeuroEngineering and Rehabilitation
items.summary: A systematic review and Bayesian network meta-analysis evaluated the effectiveness of non-pharmacological interventions for lower limb motor impairment in post-stroke hemiplegia, identifying key effective modalities.
items.curatedReason: 这项贝叶斯网络荟萃分析为卒中后偏瘫下肢运动障碍的非药物干预提供了全面的证据。你可以根据分析结果，优先选择高证据等级的干预措施，为患者制定更精准的康复计划。
items.titleZh: 卒中后偏瘫下肢运动障碍非药物干预措施的有效性：一项系统综述和贝叶斯网络荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和贝叶斯网络荟萃分析评估了卒中后偏瘫下肢运动障碍非药物干预措施的有效性，并识别出主要的有效模式。
items.curatedReasonEn: This Bayesian network meta-analysis provides comprehensive evidence for non-pharmacological interventions for lower limb motor impairment in post-stroke hemiplegia. You can use these findings to prioritize high-evidence interventions and develop more precise rehabilitation plans for your patients.
items.limitation: 贝叶斯网络荟萃分析的局限性在于其结果依赖于纳入研究的质量和异质性。
items.limitationEn: The limitation of Bayesian network meta-analysis lies in its reliance on the quality and heterogeneity of included studies.

items.title: Pioneering programme launched to test breakthrough spinal treatment in UK rehab centres
items.summary: A pioneering program has launched in UK rehab centers to test the real-world impact of Onward Medical's ARC-EX system, a UK-approved spinal cord injury treatment combining targeted electrical spinal cord stimulation with rehabilitation exercises.
items.curatedReason: UK 监管机构批准的 ARC-EX 系统结合电刺激与康复训练，为脊髓损伤患者提供了新的治疗突破。你应该密切关注这类技术在临床中心的实际应用效果，这可能改变你未来对脊髓损伤患者的康复策略，并可能影响转诊建议。
items.titleZh: 英国康复中心启动创新项目，测试突破性脊髓损伤治疗方案
items.summaryZh: 英国康复中心启动一项创新项目，测试 Onward Medical 公司的 ARC-EX 系统在真实世界中的效果；该系统是英国批准的脊髓损伤治疗方案，结合了靶向电脊髓刺激和康复训练。
items.curatedReasonEn: The UK-regulated ARC-EX system, combining electrical stimulation with rehabilitation exercises, offers a new treatment breakthrough for spinal cord injury patients. You should closely monitor the real-world effectiveness of such technologies in clinical centers, as this could change your future rehabilitation strategies for SCI patients and potentially influence referral recommendations.

items.title: Prehabilitation Improves Surgical Outcomes in Older Adults Undergoing Spinal Fusion: Study
items.summary: A randomized clinical trial found that a multimodal prehabilitation program before spinal fusion surgery in older adults was associated with a lower risk of postoperative complications and a shorter hospital stay, but the control group demonstrated better physiological function at 90-day follow-up.
items.curatedReason: 老年患者脊柱融合术前的多模式康复训练，短期内能显著减少术后并发症和缩短住院时间，是值得推行的围手术期干预策略。但在 90 天随访时，对照组患者的生理功能恢复反而更好，提示需要更长期的随访数据来综合评估。
items.titleZh: 研究发现：术前康复改善老年脊柱融合术患者的预后
items.summaryZh: 一项随机临床试验显示，老年患者在脊柱融合术前接受多模式康复训练，可降低术后并发症风险并缩短住院时间；但 90 天随访时，对照组的生理功能恢复反而更好。
items.curatedReasonEn: Multimodal prehabilitation significantly reduces postoperative complications and hospital stay in older adults undergoing spinal fusion, making it a valuable perioperative intervention. However, control group patients showed better physiological recovery at 90-day follow-up, suggesting the need for longer-term data to comprehensively assess outcomes.
items.limitation: 虽然短期效果显著，但 90 天随访发现对照组功能恢复更佳，提示该预康复方案可能需要优化或需更长随访期评估其长期效益。
items.limitationEn: Despite significant short-term effects, the 90-day follow-up showed better functional recovery in the control group, suggesting that the prehabilitation protocol may need optimization or longer follow-up periods to assess long-term benefits.

items.title: Immediate Weight-Bearing and Early Ambulation Rehabilitation After Femoral Neck System Fixation for Undisplaced Femoral Neck Fractures: A Prospective Randomized Controlled Trial
items.summary: A prospective randomized controlled trial found that immediate weight-bearing and early ambulation rehabilitation after femoral neck system fixation for undisplaced femoral neck fractures was safe and effective, promoting earlier functional recovery.
items.curatedReason: 对于无移位股骨颈骨折患者，早期负重和早期活动已被证实是安全有效的。你可以依据这一结果，在临床实践中更积极地推行早期康复方案，以促进患者功能恢复。
items.titleZh: 无移位股骨颈骨折股骨颈系统内固定术后即刻负重和早期下床活动康复：一项前瞻性随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性随机对照试验发现，无移位股骨颈骨折患者在股骨颈系统内固定术后立即负重并早期下床活动进行康复，是安全有效的，可促进更早的功能恢复。
items.curatedReasonEn: For patients with undisplaced femoral neck fractures, immediate weight-bearing and early ambulation have been proven safe and effective. You can confidently advocate for more aggressive early rehabilitation protocols in your clinical practice to promote patient functional recovery.
items.limitation: 本研究可能存在样本量不足以检测细微差异的风险，且其在印度人群中进行，结果外推到其他人群需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: This study may have an insufficient sample size to detect subtle differences, and its findings, being from an Indian population, should be generalized to other populations with caution.

items.title: The Impact of a Single Bout of Antagonist Stretching on Agonist Muscle Performance and Range of Motion: A Systematic review and Meta-analysis
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis evaluated the impact of a single bout of antagonist stretching on agonist muscle performance and range of motion, aiming to resolve conflicting findings in the literature.
items.curatedReason: 拮抗肌牵拉对主动肌表现和关节活动度的影响已得到明确。在运动前热身或训练计划中，你可以根据本综述的发现，合理安排牵拉的时机和方式，以期优化运动表现并有效预防损伤。
items.titleZh: 单一拮抗肌牵拉对主动肌表现和关节活动度的影响：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析评估了单一拮抗肌牵拉对主动肌表现和关节活动度的影响，旨在解决文献中相互冲突的发现。
items.curatedReasonEn: The impact of antagonist stretching on agonist muscle performance and range of motion has been clarified. In pre-exercise warm-ups or training plans, you can arrange the timing and method of stretching appropriately based on this review's findings to optimize athletic performance and effectively prevent injuries.
items.limitation: 原始研究可能在牵拉类型、强度、持续时间等方面存在异质性，影响荟萃分析的整体结论。
items.limitationEn: Original studies may have heterogeneity in stretching types, intensity, and duration, affecting the overall conclusions of the meta-analysis.

items.title: Validity and reliability of remote administration of the one-leg stand, timed up and go and 30-second sit-to-stand via video call in patients with lumbar spinal stenosis awaiting decompression surgery
items.summary: A study validated the reliability of remote administration of the one-leg stand, timed up and go, and 30-second sit-to-stand tests via video call in patients with lumbar spinal stenosis, showing strong agreement with in-person assessments.
items.curatedReason: 远程评估工具在脊柱管狭窄患者中的有效性得到了验证。这意味着你可以更灵活地使用远程医疗技术，对等待手术的腰椎管狭窄患者进行跌倒风险和功能评估，提高患者的可及性。
items.titleZh: 视频通话远程实施单腿站立、计时起身行走和 30 秒坐站测试在腰椎管狭窄症患者中的有效性和可靠性
items.summaryZh: 一项研究验证了通过视频通话对腰椎管狭窄症患者进行单腿站立、计时起身行走和 30 秒坐站测试的有效性和可靠性，结果显示与现场评估具有高度一致性。
items.curatedReasonEn: The validity and reliability of remote assessment tools for lumbar spinal stenosis patients have been validated. This means you can more flexibly use telehealth technology to assess fall risk and function in patients awaiting decompression surgery for lumbar spinal stenosis, improving patient access.
items.limitation: 本研究的样本量和患者特征可能限制其外推性，且远程评估可能无法捕捉所有线下评估的细节。
items.limitationEn: The sample size and patient characteristics of this study may limit its generalizability, and remote assessments may not capture all the details of in-person evaluations.

items.title: Effect of pain neuroscience education on pain, kinesiophobia, disability, and quality of life in patients with frozen shoulder: a randomized controlled trial
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial found that pain neuroscience education significantly improved pain, kinesiophobia, disability, and quality of life in patients with frozen shoulder.
items.curatedReason: 疼痛神经科学教育（PNE）对冻结肩患者的疼痛、运动恐惧症、残疾和生活质量均有积极影响，可考虑作为辅助干预手段。
items.titleZh: 疼痛神经科学教育对冻结肩患者疼痛、运动恐惧症、残疾和生活质量的影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验显示，疼痛神经科学教育（PNE）能显著改善冻结肩患者的疼痛、运动恐惧症、残疾程度和生活质量。
